routes.notes: Mobile reorder now places the first action card within the initial viewport; profile fetch failure remains.
Contacts shell is coherent but console preload warnings remain.

findings.summary: Live session logged a profile fetch failure.
findings.evidence: Browser event stream included dashboard_profile_error with TypeError: fetch failed and userId 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000.
findings.recommendation: Harden the profile fetch path so the dashboard degrades gracefully instead of partially failing.

findings.summary: Unused preload warnings appear in the live console.
findings.evidence: Console warnings reported preloaded fonts and a CSS chunk not used within a few seconds of load.
findings.recommendation: Remove or retune preload hints so the warnings stop appearing.
